meta.patientListDescription: Review your training enrollments, open available training details, and continue the runtime steps that are available now.
meta.catalogFallbackDescription: Review available training details and schedule availability.
meta.patientDetailDescription: Review your training enrollment, payment state, and join access when available.
meta.patientPayDescription: Complete payment for your training enrollment when payment is still required.
meta.adminDescription: Manage the training catalog, publish states, and schedules within the current admin contract.
meta.adminDetailDescription: Review and update training details, schedules, and publish/archive actions within the current admin contract.

home.title: Keep your training steps visible without turning this into a full learning platform.
home.note: This baseline shows what training is available now, what you already enrolled in, and what action is truly available next.

scopeItems.catalog: Review the current training catalog and schedule availability.
scopeItems.enrollment: Open your own enrollment details, payment state, and attendance visibility.
scopeItems.join: Check join access only when the backend says your enrollment is eligible.

boundaryItems.noLms: This is not a full LMS or academy workspace.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Certificates are not part of this baseline.
boundaryItems.noQuizzes: Quizzes, assignments, and scoring are not exposed here.

enrollments.heading: My training
enrollments.note: Use this area to continue a real enrollment, complete payment when needed, or review what already happened.

empty.heading: No training enrollments yet
empty.note: Start by opening one of the available training items below and review the next honest step from there.

error.heading: Training enrollments are not available right now
error.note: Could not load your training enrollments.

catalog.heading: Available training
catalog.note: These items come from the current published training catalog. Open one to review schedules and start only when enrollment is actually open.
catalog.fallbackDescription: Open this training to review the current schedule availability and the real enrollment boundary.

error.heading: Training catalog is not available right now
error.note: Could not load the current training catalog.

empty.heading: No training is available right now
empty.note: There are no published training items in the current catalog.

catalogDetail.fallbackDescription: Review the current training overview and the schedules that are actually available right now.

scopeItems.enroll: Start an enrollment only from a schedule that is currently open.
scopeItems.pay: Payment stays part of the enrollment flow when the backend requires it.
scopeItems.join: Join access stays blocked until enrollment becomes active.

catalogDetail.boundaryHeading: What this flow does not include

boundaryItems.noCurriculum: There is no lesson tree or course player in this baseline.
boundaryItems.noAssignments: Assignments and graded progress are not part of this flow.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Completion does not imply certificates or graduation tooling.

catalogDetail.openSchedulesNote: {value, number} schedule(s) are currently open for enrollment.
catalogDetail.closedSchedulesNote: No schedule is currently open for enrollment. You can still review the timeline and availability reasons below.
catalogDetail.notScheduled: Start time is not available yet
catalogDetail.seatsOpen: Seat limit is not shown for this schedule
catalogDetail.capacity: {available, number} of {total, number} seats currently free

actions.alreadyEnrolled: You already have an enrollment for this schedule.
actions.error: Could not start this enrollment right now.

availability.STATUS_NOT_OPEN: This schedule is not in an enrollment-ready state right now.
availability.WINDOW_CLOSED: The enrollment window has already closed.
availability.INVALID_WINDOW: This schedule is not currently open because its enrollment window is unavailable.

error.heading: Training detail is not available right now
error.note: Could not load this training detail right now.

empty.heading: No schedules are visible right now
empty.note: This training does not currently expose any schedule in the public training contract.

detail.notScheduled: Schedule time is not available yet
detail.joinNote: Join access stays controlled by the backend. Check here only when your enrollment is active and the schedule is near its live window.
detail.joinReady: Join access is available now. Open the external room when you are ready.
detail.joinError: Could not resolve join access right now.

stateNotes.PENDING_PAYMENT: Payment is still required before this enrollment becomes active.
stateNotes.ACTIVE: This enrollment is active. You can review join access when the schedule reaches its live window.
stateNotes.COMPLETED: This training enrollment is completed in the current runtime baseline.
stateNotes.NO_SHOW: This enrollment was marked as no-show.
stateNotes.CANCELLED: This enrollment is no longer active.
stateNotes.REFUNDED: This enrollment was refunded and is no longer available for runtime access.

paymentNotes.CREATED: A payment record was created for this enrollment.
paymentNotes.PENDING: Payment is still pending and the enrollment stays blocked until it succeeds.
paymentNotes.REQUIRES_ACTION: Payment still needs action before enrollment can activate.
paymentNotes.AUTHORIZED: Payment is authorized and waiting for the final captured state.
paymentNotes.CANCELLED: The current payment attempt was cancelled.
paymentNotes.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is still in progress for this enrollment.
paymentNotes.PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Part of this payment was refunded.

joinBlocked.ENROLLMENT_NOT_ACTIVE: Join stays blocked until the enrollment becomes active.
joinBlocked.SCHEDULE_NOT_JOINABLE: This schedule is not in a joinable state right now.
joinBlocked.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNAVAILABLE: The schedule timing is not available yet.
joinBlocked.JOIN_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: The join window is not open yet.
joinBlocked.JOIN_ACCESS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Join access has not been configured for this schedule.
joinBlocked.UNKNOWN: Join access is not available right now.

error.heading: Training enrollment is not available right now

pay.heading: Complete training payment
pay.note: This payment stays inside the training enrollment flow. Once payment succeeds, the enrollment can become active according to the backend contract.
pay.hostedCheckoutNote: Open the hosted checkout page to continue this training payment.

error.heading: Training payment is not available right now
error.note: Could not load this enrollment payment state.

notPayable.heading: This enrollment does not need payment right now
notPayable.note: The current enrollment state no longer requires a payment step.

noRuntime.heading: Payment runtime is not available right now
noRuntime.note: This enrollment does not currently expose a hosted checkout link or a payment form runtime.

admin.title: Manage the training catalog and schedules without turning this into a full LMS.
admin.note: This surface stays operational. Create or update training items, publish or archive them, and manage schedule windows only where the backend allows it.

scopeItems.visibility: Review the current training list with status and visibility.
scopeItems.scheduleRead: Create and maintain schedule windows with enrollment timing.
scopeItems.runtimeBoundary: Publish or archive training items when the contract allows it.

boundaryItems.noAuthoring: Deep curriculum authoring and lesson structures are not part of this baseline.
boundaryItems.noAnalytics: Training analytics and reporting are not part of this surface.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Certificates, assessments, and advanced learner tooling stay outside scope.

admin.fallbackDescription: This screen focuses on real backend training items without overbuilding the admin scope.

cards.schedulesValue: {value, number} total â€¢ {open, number} open now

create.heading: Create training item
create.note: Start with the minimum details. You can refine, publish, and schedule from the detail screen.
create.label: Admin-only
create.helper: Use a lowercase, hyphenated slug only.

validation.slug: Slug must be lowercase and hyphenated only.

create.adminOnlyNote: Training management is available to admin roles only.

placeholders.title: Add a clear training title
placeholders.fullDescription: Operational overview for the training detail

detail.note: Review core details, schedules, and the allowed publish/archive actions from the current contract.
detail.snapshotNote: Use this summary to quickly tell whether the training item is still being prepared, whether schedules are already visible for operations, and whether this screen currently exposes limited management controls or only visibility.

draft.title: Still in draft
draft.note: This training item is still in draft. Review the core content and any schedule setup before treating it as a live offering.

published.title: Published baseline
published.note: This training item is already published in the current contract, so the main posture here is bounded operational management.

archived.title: Archived and limited
archived.note: This training item is archived. The current admin baseline should stay careful about implying broader authoring control.

none.title: No schedules yet
none.note: No schedules are currently visible for this training item, so schedule work starts from creation rather than review.

open.title: Schedules are actively open
open.note: At least one schedule is currently open for enrollment. Review timing and room details carefully before changing anything.

closed.title: Schedules exist but are not open now
closed.note: Schedules already exist for this training item, but none is currently open for enrollment.

limitedActions.title: Limited management actions are available
limitedActions.note: This screen exposes only the publish and archive controls that the backend currently allows for this training item.

readOnly.title: Visibility first right now
readOnly.note: No publish or archive control is currently available for this training state, so the screen should be treated as visibility and update management only.

adminOnly.title: Inspection only for non-admin roles
adminOnly.note: The current role can inspect training details here, but management controls remain restricted to admin roles.

schedules.note: Only schedules returned by the backend are visible here.

error.heading: Schedules are not available
error.note: Could not load schedule data for this training.

empty.heading: No schedules yet
empty.note: This training has no schedules in the current admin contract.

actions.note: Only actions supported by the backend are shown here.
actions.adminOnly: Actions are available to admin roles only.
actions.notAvailable: No actions are available for this status yet.

notAvailable.heading: No action is available right now
notAvailable.note: The current training status does not expose publish or archive controls in this admin baseline.

adminOnly.heading: This area is inspection only for your role
adminOnly.note: You can review training details here, but publish and archive controls remain limited to admin roles.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive this training item?
archiveConfirm.description: Archive only when this training item should stop staying active in the current training admin baseline.

update.note: Update the current training details using the contract-allowed fields only.

validation.slug: Slug must be lowercase and hyphenated only.

placeholders.title: Update the training title
placeholders.fullDescription: Operational overview for the training detail

createSchedule.note: Create a new schedule only when the window and timing are ready.

validation.required: Enrollment and session windows are required.
validation.enrollmentWindow: Enrollment open must be before enrollment close.
validation.sessionWindow: Start time must be before end time.
validation.closeBeforeStart: Enrollment must close before the session starts.

boundaryItems.noAnalytics: Analytics and reporting are not included in this baseline.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Certificates and learner outcomes are outside scope.
boundaryItems.noAdvancedLms: Advanced LMS authoring is not part of this baseline.

error.heading: Training detail is not available
error.note: Could not load the training detail right now.

notFound.heading: Training item not found
notFound.note: The requested training item could not be found.

errors.slugAlreadyExists: Slug already exists. Choose a different one.
errors.archivedReadOnly: This training is archived and read-only.
errors.localeRequired: Locale is required to update translations.
errors.invalidPublishTransition: This training cannot be published from its current status.
errors.invalidArchiveTransition: This training cannot be archived from its current status.
errors.invalidScheduleTransition: Schedule status transition is not allowed.
errors.enrollmentMustCloseBeforeStart: Enrollment must close before the session starts.
errors.cannotOpenPastSchedule: Enrollment cannot open for a past schedule.
errors.externalJoinUrlRequired: External join URL is required when a provider is set.
errors.externalRoomProviderRequired: External room provider is required when a join URL is provided.
errors.capacityBelowCurrentEnrollments: Capacity cannot be below current enrollments.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while saving training changes.

empty.heading: No training items are visible right now
empty.note: The current admin training contract did not return any training items.

error.heading: Training visibility is not available right now
error.note: Could not load the current admin training snapshot.
